OUR MENU

Sushi Sliders Appetizers Cocktails Wine & Beer
Section 01

The Artisan
Sushi Rolls

Served a la carte, 8-10 pieces. Every roll named after a classic rock legend. Ask to make any roll spicy.

Specialty Rolls

Tiny Dancer

$17

shrimp, crab, avocado, topped with salmon & baked

Baba O'Riley

$16

smoked salmon, asparagus, cream cheese

American Woman 🌶️

$19

crab, red pepper, tempura sweet potato, spicy sauce

$20

tempura soft shell crab, cucumber

Rocky Raccoon

$19

crab tempura, cucumber, topped with eel & avocado

The Joker

$19

tempura salmon & eel, cucumber, avocado

Crazy Train (Dragon)

$20

shrimp tempura, eel, cucumber, topped with avocado & house sauce

Lola

$20

shrimp tempura, cucumber, cream cheese, topped with sweet potato & avocado

$20

$13

crab, red pepper, cucumber

$18

Rocket Man (Rainbow)

$17

crab, cucumber, avocado, topped with tuna, salmon, redsnapper & avocado

$17

Free Bird

$18

$16

Roxanne

Pink Cadillac

$18

cucumber, avocado, red pepper, topped with tuna

Section 02

Signature
Sliders

$6 each or 3 for $15. Every slider is a study in texture and bold flavor.

Section 03

The Mixology

All crafted with 1.5oz of liquor. Hand-crafted cocktails perfected by our innovative bartenders.

Phil Collins

$13

Bombay Sapphire Gin, triple sec, fresh lemon, fresh lime, fresh orange, sugar, soda

Motor City Manhattan

$12

Canadian Club 12 Year, sweet vermouth, cherry bitters, black cherry

Old Fashioned

$13

Jim Beam Bourbon, brown simple syrup, burnt orange

+$2 for Premium

Cucumber Thunder

$13

house gin, mint, cucumber, lime, simple syrup, soda

Kentucky Ass

$13

Maker's Mark Bourbon, house-made ginger syrup, crushed ice, lime

Boston George

$14

Canadian Club Rye, egg whites, fresh lemon & lime, simple syrup, bitters

Buddha Tea

$12

house rye, peach schnapps, fresh lemon & lime, house-made ginger syrup, tea blend

Mojito

$12

house rum, mint, lime, soda, house-made puree

Premium: strawberry or blueberry +$1

Caesar

$13

house vodka, house-made caesar mix, seasonal veg garnish

Spiked Lemonade

$11

vodka, fresh squeezed lemonade, house made puree

Premium: strawberry or blueberry +$1

Espresso Martini

$14

house vodka, kahlua, espresso

Last Word / Wrong Word

$14

house gin, green chartreuse, maraschino liqueur, lime

Wrong Word adds mezcal rinse +$1

The Toronto

$12

Canadian Club 12 Year, fernet branca, bitters, brown simple syrup, burnt orange

Negroni

$13

house gin, sweet vermouth, burnt orange

+$2 for Premium

The intersection of high-fidelity sound and culinary excellence. Good Food. Good Music. Good People. Good Vibes.
